subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who standeth alone in grandeur and might, Who is singular in majesty and sovereign will, Who acteth through His dominion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی توحد بالعظمه و الاقتدار و تفرد بالعزه و الاختیار یفعل بسلطانه
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @unity; oneness of humanity, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @review of publications, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
